narrative:
Fairlawn 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 939 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
